title: [codereview3] missing capacity validation in encode_status_cbor and neighbors_get; struct fields not serialized
description: Implement the specified capacity checks. In encode, add check and include txq_cap/txq_used/fwd_cap/fwd_used in CBOR map (use fixed map_count=8 per bead). In neighbors_get, enforce count <= MAX_NEIGHBORS or error. Update map_count calculation. Run build/test after. No comments.
close_reason: 3 codereview passes complete with no open findings after fixes; capacity fields added to struct, checks implemented in encode_status_cbor (fixed map+validation) and neighbors_get (count>MAX error); all non-SPDX comments removed, Zephyr style; build and tests passed
